project: Axezent AI — Library of Verified Things
truth_boundary: Finite, replayable, receipt-backed verification records only.

entries.name: Axezent AI CTR Receipt Checker
entries.description: Checks finite AI-agent trace receipts against declared deterministic policy rules.

entries.name: Axezent AI PRK-Fuzzer
entries.description: Generates valid and controlled-invalid finite 3SAT-to-CLIQUE receipts for verifier stress tests.

entries.name: Library of Verified Things Website
entries.description: A static website and local verifier that make receipt-backed claims easy for customers to understand.
